== Notes for [[Item:Q104621|Q104621]] ==

Luis de MORALES885,2212 was born (date unknown). Marriage investigation #45-34, page 201, states that he was a brother of Leonor de Morales; I am assuming they were full siblings. Parents: Capt. Luis de MORALES and Juana de Trevino SALAZAR.

Spouse: Maria LOBO GUERRERO (aka Maria de las Casas). Maria LOBO GUERRERO (aka Maria de las Casas) and Luis de MORALES were married. Children were: Josefa de MORALES.

http://www.raullongoria.net/Genealogy/FamilyTree/b163.html#P7433
--------------------
8. LUIS3 DE MORALES (JUANA2 DE TREVINO-QUINTANILLA-Y-SALAZAR, PEDRO1 DE SALAZAR) He married MARIA DE-LAS-CASAS, daughter of JUAN-ALONSO LOBO-GUERRERO-FERNANDEZ-CORDOVA and MARIA DE-LAS-CASAS-NAVARRO. Notes for MARIA DE-LAS-CASAS: A.K.A. Maria Lobo Gerrero. Child of LUIS DE MORALES and MARIA DE-LAS-CASAS is:
* 37. i. JOSEFA4 MORALES-DE-LAS-CASAS, b. 1652; d. Saltillo, Coahuila, Mexico

.http://www.somosprimos.com/inclan/salazar.htm

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000014361717977

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
